[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 10111110 6
1 01101111 6
2 10010010 3
3 01100011 4
4 00001000 1
5 11111011 7
6 10000000 1
7 10001001 3

01 10 01101011 5
12 21 11111011 7 match 5
23 32 11111011 7 match 5
34 43 10001001 3 match 7
45 54 11001011 5
56 65 11111111 a
67 76 11111111 a
70 07 11110011 6

02 20 11111011 7 match 5
13 31 10001000 2
24 42 11111011 7 match 5
35 53 11000011 4
46 64 11111101 7
57 75 11010011 5
60 06 11111111 a
71 17 10011010 4

03 30 11100011 5
14 41 10001001 3 match 7
25 52 11111011 7 match 5
36 63 11111101 7
47 74 10011011 5
50 05 01100011 4 match 3
61 16 11111101 7
72 27 11111011 7 match 5

04 40 11101011 6

37 73 10010010 3 match 2
